title: Sculk Enchantment Glint
description: Sculk around with this ancient disco ball glint.
body:
Sculk around with this ancient disco ball glint.
(Set a high glint strength for the best effect!)

Note that this pack uses vanilla shaders to skew the texture.
It may not be compatible with Sodium and other renderers.
